Messages.Content:
Summarize this conversation in 1 to 2 lines:

You: hello Alissa
Alissa: Hey there! I'm here to help with coding questions, especially in C-family languages. How can I assist you today? 
You: well, i am Jackson, your creator per say. and i am still running tests.
Alissa: Hey Jackson. How can I assist with your tests? I'm here to help with coding stuff in C-family languages. What do you need?
You: so, i am testing memory right now, any chance you remember my name?
Alissa: I don't remember your name unless you told me earlier. Did you mention it before? 
You: actually i did. speaking of, do you remember anything at all?
Alissa: I don't have memory storage—my knowledge is based on what you teach me. Did you need help with something specific?
Jackson tested Alissa's memory by asking if she remembered his name, and she explained her knowledge is based on what he teaches her.
